title: google-vertex: Missing gemini-3.1-flash-lite in provider catalog causes silent failure instead of error

ambiguity.why_not_hard: The issue explicitly identifies the missing provider catalog entry and the fallback/runtime silent-failure path, so routing is direct.

per_label_rationale.model_serving: The issue centers on a Google Vertex provider catalog/model selection failure for a hosted model endpoint.
per_label_rationale.model_releases: The missing entry is a specific new/versioned Gemini model, gemini-3.1-flash-lite.
per_label_rationale.agent_runtime: The failure path is in the embedded agent runner and model fallback loop, preventing the agent from producing a reply.
per_label_rationale.reliability: A model_not_found FailoverError with no fallback is swallowed, causing a silent failure instead of a recoverable/user-visible error.
per_label_rationale.config: The requested fix includes correcting the static provider catalog/default model mapping for Google Vertex.

excluded_label_rationale.chat_integrations: Discord is only the observed channel; the root cause is provider catalog and agent fallback handling, not Discord integration behavior.
